description_long: This object is a rectangular juice carton with a peaked top, resembling the classic Tetra Pak style. The top features a small, protruding spout or straw angled outward, which is typical for single-serve juice containers. The body of the carton is tall and boxy, with flat sides and a slightly tapered upper section leading to the spout. The silhouette is entirely dark, with no visible branding, text, or illustrations on the exterior. The overall form is compact and portable, suitable for handheld use in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or playgrounds.
description: A tall, peaked-top juice carton with a protruding straw, classic for single-serve drinks. The exterior is plain and unmarked.
description_view_0: Side view showing the peaked top and a straw extending outward from the upper right.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the flat face of the carton with no visible straw or spout.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the straw now extending to the left, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a flat, featureless face similar to the front.
